author: Kenney (kenney.nl)
status: imported + license-verified; NOT yet wired into the game
notes: Verified CC0 from the bundled LICENSE.txt (CC0 1.0 Universal). Kept as a real, license-tracked external import that proves the verified-CC0 pipeline. It is intentionally not wired: this is a 2014 dungeon/RPG sheet, and the unlabeled grid can't be sliced into correct named sprites without visual review. To adopt: slice named cells, normalize to art/generated/from_external/active/<mirrored path>, and record in ../../../generated/from_external/manifest.json.
